name: Appa (Hoppers>
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast and sugar in the warm water and set aside for 5 minutes.
2. Sieve the rice flour and salt into a bowl.
3. Add the coconut milk, yeast mixture, and sugar to the flour mixture, then mix until it forms a smooth batter.
4. Cover the batter and let it rest overnight.
5. Grease a hopper pan with oil.
6. Heat the pan over moderate heat and pour about 75 ml of batter into the center.
7. Tilt the pan so the batter spreads into a thin, round circle.
8. Cover with the lid and cook until the hoppers are set.
9. Use a blunt knife to gently lift the cooked hopper from the pan.
